torch

The main library of PyTorch.

It provides tensors (similar to NumPy arrays) and tools to train and run neural networks.

Used for deep learning models, training, and inference.

In your FastAPI AI microservice, this is what loads and runs the trained model.

torchvision 
###################not needed in prod: ######################
torchvision torch
torchvision
numpy
matplotlib
jupyter
##############################################################

A companion library for PyTorch focused on computer vision.

Provides:

Pretrained models (ResNet, MobileNet, etc.)

Image datasets

Image transformation utilities (resize, normalize, crop).

In your case, it helps prepare images before sending them to the model.

pillow

The modern version of PIL (Python Imaging Library).

Used to open, manipulate, and process images in Python.

In a FastAPI API, it usually:

Reads uploaded images

Converts them to the format the model expects.

python-multipart

Allows FastAPI to handle file uploads.

When a user uploads an image with multipart/form-data, this package parses the request.

Without it, FastAPI cannot receive uploaded files.
